heading: Omitted
label: 112a Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , amended acts , ; , ; and , , to include live poultry in their provisions, added “and/or live poultry” following “live stock” wherever the term “live stock” appeared, and extended the penalties, terms, and provisions of said acts to live poultry.
